emails.subject: RE: Bridgeline/HPL/Coal Accrual VaR
emails.body: RE: Bridgeline/HPL/Coal Accrual VaR Hi Scott, Could I get the Var calculation for Bridgeline for October, November and December month end? You may have previously sent this to Adarsh Vakharia, but I am not able to access his files. Thanks, Susie

emails.subject: RE: Bridgeline/HPL/Coal Accrual VaR
emails.body: AdHoc VaR in not working in the RAC site. I will see what I can do to get this to you. Thanks.

emails.subject: RE: Bridgeline/HPL/Coal Accrual VaR
emails.body: Any luck with the VAR? Thanks, Susie

emails.subject: RE: Bridgeline/HPL/Coal Accrual VaR
emails.body: No. The reference date has expired, thus adhoc VaR returns zero for VaR numbers.
